Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond Torequest For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. LILLIAN MA, Esq. of Law Offices of Mark T. Lobre (Tel: 415-281-7112) for defendant Kaila Aileen Vilchez Rojas;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT KAILA VILCHEZROJAS' Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond Torequest For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is GRANTED. All objections are waived. Verified responses to be served within 10 days. The request for sanctions against plaintiff and their attorney is GRANTED in the amount of $660.00. Payment to be made within 10 days.

Defendant to prepare and submit a proposed order in both .pdf and Word format to the Judge Pro Tem at noah@ndllegal.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
